channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WWE star JD McDonagh hits head in high-risk move during match, reveals extent of injuries
item.description: WWE star JD McDonagh smacked his head on "Raw" Monday night after a high-risk move during a tag-team championship match. He revealed the extent of his injuries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA transgender female runner laments issue with spikes despite clobbering competition at meet
item.description: Rochester Institute of Technology transgender sprinter Sadie Schreiner lamented an issue with her spikes despite winning the 200-meter race by more than a second.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big-time Love: Arizona's Caleb Love hits half-court heave at buzzer in OT win over No. 3 Iowa State
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Caleb Love trotted back, his head down, shoulders slumped after the latest of his missed 3-pointers clanged the back rim. This was not his night — until it was.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scary health incidents overshadow Duke's 10-point win over NC State
item.description: Duke's win over N.C. State on Monday night was overshadowed by a pair of bizarre health-related incidents that took place in the second half.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Love ties it with halfcourt shot at buzzer, Arizona knocks off No. 3 Iowa State 86-75 in OT
item.description: Caleb Love hit a tying heave from beyond halfcourt at the end of regulation and made two more 3-pointers in overtime, finishing with 22 points and lifting Arizona to an 86-75 win over No. 3 Iowa State.
item.dc:creator: John Marshall, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Flagg's big 2nd half helps No. 2 Duke hold off NC State 74-64 to stay unbeaten in ACC
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Star freshman Cooper Flagg scored 23 of his 28 points after halftime to help No. 2 Duke hold off North Carolina State 74-64 on Monday night. Fellow rookie Kon Knueppel had 19 points for the Blue Devils (18-2, 10-0 Atlantic Coast Conference), who have won 14 straight games.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Butler suspended for the 3rd time this month by the Miami Heat as trade deadline looms
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was back from suspension. Again. And then Butler got suspended by the Miami Heat. Again. Butler has been suspended for the third time this month by the Heat, this one starting basically just as the second one was ending.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Orioles hire former All-Star outfielder Adam Jones as special advisor to GM and community ambassador
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Retired five-time All-Star outfielder Adam Jones is returning to the Baltimore Orioles as a special advisor to general manager Mike Elias as well as a community ambassador. The Orioles announced the move Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Title IX probe into Florida's Todd Golden dismissed, lawyer says
item.description: Florida Gators men's basketball coach Todd Golden had a Title IX investigation over sexual misconduct allegations dismissed, his lawyer said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Profar agrees to $42M, 3-year contract with Braves
item.description: Jurickson Profar agreed to a $42 million, three-year contract with the Atlanta Braves on Thursday, less than a year after the outfielder got a $1 million deal from the San Diego Padres with spring training already underway.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander torches Jazz for career-high 54
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a matchup between the Western Conference's best and worst teams, the Utah Jazz (10-32) gave the Oklahoma City Thunder (36-7) quite a scare on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Students receive career lessons at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: About 30 local students got more than a chance to watch golf at Torrey Pines on Wednesday — they got valuable career insights that could shape their futures.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Mitchell High School alum playing for Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays are gearing up for the season. Mitchell High School alum and Tampa Bay native, Trevor Harrison, is headed to Rays camp in just a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cubs, WGN were early Chicago connections for Ben Johnson
item.description: CHICAGO — Like so many Cubs fans around the country, Ben Johnson also ran inside to watch Cubs baseball on WGN after school. In Johnson's highly-anticipated introductory press conference, he mentioned that he and his family go to a Cubs game once a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: NFL playoffs: Championship weekend on tap as 4 teams vie for a trip to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The road to Super Bowl LIX ends Sunday. It's championship weekend, and by the time it's all over, we'll know which teams will represent the AFC and NFC on Sunday, Feb. 9, in New Orleans to play for the Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Trial postponed for Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers in domestic case
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday on domestic violence charges.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: The sweet stench of NHL hockey
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Hockey players sweat buckets, perhaps more than any other athletes in any other sport. They are wearing sweaters, after all. "It's disgusting," said Utah Hockey Club center Liam O'Brien.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles 11-year-old pulls one-of-a-kind baseball card
item.description: An 11-year-old baseball card collector from Los Angeles just pulled what is likely the most important card they will ever pull. Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed Tuesday morning that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked. The card features the patch that the 2023 No.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
